basic_info.short_form: Institute of Technology & Science UG Campus

address.address: I.T.S UG Institute Mohan Nagar India

pos_sentences: The clubs are so good for our entertainment. we enjoyed a lot there after the classes.
Faculty member are very good they are always supportive and care they teach with their 100% capabilities all students are equal in their eye
Its provides good placement opportunities in a well known companies like wipro tcs etc
The admission process is very easy and comfortable, first of all, they treat me very well.
Our college is one of the best colleges in india.
Bca as a course is good but if you want a good placements you have to work on your skills you have to learn languages and become advanced in it.
Admission process is a very smooth and easy to understand to everyone.
Admission process is very easy to understand so i don't have any desire to understand.
It was for 3 months and they were giving perks of 5-10 thousand.
neg_sentences: Management staff is not good as per the requirement
College campus is not upto the mark it is small in area as compared to other colleges.
Fee is little much expensive than other colleges
